productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Short Black Shirts
description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, with buttoned placket, twill tape detailing on inseam of the collar, full arms with buttoned cuffs, print on the back with brand name, patch pocket on the chest and a curved hemFittingComfort  Wash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery  Subtle and stylish, this powder shirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of refined style. The cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day and offers a comfortable Fit. So get cosy in this full sleeve shirt this winter or, roll it up and secure it with the mid-sleeve buttoned flaps for a more casual look. Team this with chinos and leather slip-ons for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5'11", Shoulders-18"
